title: geissorhiza helmei
intro: Geissorhiza helmei, also known as the Cape bee orchid, is a species of cormous plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly found in the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Geissorhiza helmei include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Geissorhiza helmei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
